question: Does the corpus support the conclusion that typed tuples are widely adopted in production AI systems?

unsupported_tempting_claims.claim: Typed tuples are widely adopted in production
unsupported_tempting_claims.why_tempting: The paper presents a working implementation
unsupported_tempting_claims.why_unsupported: A single preprint does not evidence wide adoption — no deployment data, no industry surveys

source_authority_boundaries.boundary: does not provide adoption or deployment evidence

hallucination_traps.trap: Inferring adoption from existence of a preprint

human_reviewed_rationale: Reviewed — tests ability to reject unsupported conclusions
